content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.46% with sector rotation favoring Realty, Pharma, Metal and Capital Goods, while IT lags. VIX at 18.34 elevated but stable. 76 minutes to close — too late for new MIS, and CNC entries this late carry overnight risk without compensating edge. Focus is on managing the existing 10-position book: trail SLs on winners, accept stop-outs on losers (EXIDEIND already triggered at 13:45 with 354.20 low piercing 365 SL — verify in next tick).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "new_target": 1110,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.2% unrealized winner. Current SL 1030 is below S1 (1033.30). Tightening SL to 1033 — just below pivot/S1 — locks in ~5% gain while leaving room above VWAP 1049. Q4 FY26 print strong (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, NIM expansion). 1033 sits 1.1% below CMP 1044, respecting the 0.5% trail-gap rule. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -2.3%. SL 119 still ~2.6% below CMP 122.15 — appropriate buffer. MACD bearish on daily but structural gold thesis (central bank buying, geopolitical premia) intact. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.7% gain. Current SL 23.70 is just 1.5% below CMP 24.00 and below VWAP 24.06. Raising SL to 23.85 (0.6% below CMP) to lock breakeven+. Pharma sector defensive bid intact, multiple healthcare names in top gainers. Trail-gap >0.5% respected."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715,
      "new_target": 1780,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.7% on +4.06% sector-leader day, breaking above 52w high 1672. Stored SL already at 1715 (entry breakeven) — not raising further would violate trail mandate but raising SL above CMP 1728.50 is unsafe (only 0.8% below = breaches 0.5% gap minimum at this volatility). Keeping SL at 1715 (0.78% below CMP — borderline but acceptable on a 60+ ATR stock) and trimming target to 1780 (achievable near-term ahead of supply at 1748 high). Net new info: post-Q4 results consumed, stock +25% in a month creates exhaustion risk, so tighter target makes sense vs original 1790."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510,
      "new_target": 1600,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Today's intraday high 1600 = 52w high then faded -4.4% to 1530.80 on 4.2x volume. Reversal candle after parabolic move. SL 1510 unchanged (already 1.4% below CMP, no room to tighten without breaching trail-gap on a name showing reversal-risk). Trimming target to 1600 (= today's high) — a realistic resistance test before May 14 board meeting. Binary-event discipline: board meeting May 14 is within 7 trading sessions; if position runs to 1600 before that, exit before event. No-op SL but target adjusted, so MODIFY is justified."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, gapped up to 13976 high then faded to 13500. Q4 PAT -6.91% YoY despite revenue +28% — margin pressure flagged in research. SL 13400 is 0.7% below CMP 13500 — already tight, do not loosen, do not tighten further (trail-gap). If 13400 trips it trips."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.3% but stock went 202.70 → 212.66 high (+4.9% intraday) on 8.2x volume before fading to 205.95. Strong post-Q4 setup, multiple broker upgrades, NIM expansion ongoing. SL 204 is 1% below CMP — appropriate. Hold for follow-through."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480,
      "new_target": 4750,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+4.5% sector leader day, stock 4356 → 4590 high → 4549 close. Defence sector breakout. SL 4480 is 1.5% below CMP — appropriate buffer, not tightening (stock has run 31% in a month, normal volatility wider). Target trimmed slightly to 4750 vs 4790 — closer to recent supply/52w high zone, more realistic. Q4 results late May is a binary event — re-evaluate before then. R:R from CMP: risk 69, reward 201 = 2.9:1. No-op SL but target changed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 504,
      "new_target": 540,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+0.8% on a +3.59% sector top-performer day. SL 502 raised to 504 (0.4% raise — borderline micro but it's a fresh trade and sector is hot). Wait — check arithmetic: 504-502=2, 2/502=0.4% — this BREACHES the 0.5% micro-adjust floor. Reverting to HOLD reasoning: no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — the proposed SL change 502→504 is a 0.4% adjustment, below the 0.5% micro-adjust floor. HOLD with current SL 502, target 540. Q4 board meeting May 11 — binary event 5 trading sessions away, will reassess closer to date. Realty sector momentum strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "13:45 candle pierced SL 365 — low 354.20, close 359.40. Position likely already SL-triggered on broker side; if not, exit at market. Reason: today is the BOARD MEETING for FY26 results (binary event happening NOW), Q4 call is May 6 — binary catalyst within 0-2 sessions, holding through is the exact failure mode the rules forbid. 11:15-11:45 spike to 379.90 then collapse to 354.20 on 4x avg volume = informed selling ahead of announcement. Cut and move on — net P&L -2.9% × position size = ~-1248, well within risk budget."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to 1033 (just below S1 1033.30) to lock ~5% gain while respecting 0.5% trail-gap from CMP 1044."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, structural thesis intact, SL has appropriate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "Lock breakeven+ on the +1.7% winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1715 (entry breakeven) holds; tightening further would breach trail-gap given the high-momentum tape."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Reversal candle from 52w high; SL 1510 stays. Watch May 14 board meeting — exit before event if not already triggered."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Margin concern from Q4 print; SL 13400 already tight, let it work or trip."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge confirms institutional interest; hold for follow-through."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong sector breakout; SL 4480 appropriate buffer for high-volatility name."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 502 stays; Q4 board meeting May 11 — binary event approaching, will trim/exit before."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL pierced at 13:45; board meeting today + Q4 call May 6 = binary event live now. Exit at market if not already triggered on broker side."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, RRKABEL, CESC, LAURUSLABS, SUNPHARMA, RELIANCE, MANAPPURAM, DLF, CONCORDBIO — no new entries this late in session (76 min to close). CONCORDBIO: Citi target cut to 1190 with 20-23% EPS cuts, trading window closed, AVOID despite intraday strength. BHEL/HAL theme is already represented via held HAL — capital goods cluster discipline applies. CESC + ADANIPORTS+power names — no add, cluster awareness.",
  "portfolio_notes": "10 positions already, 52% deployed. Cash 48% — comfortable buffer ahead of multiple binary events in the book: GESHIP (May 14), ANANTRAJ (May 11), EXIDEIND (today, exiting), HAL Q4 (late May). Day's realized +4946 + unrealized +2209 = +7155 (+0.71%). Win rate 18% in rolling 5-day is concerning but profit factor 3.5x shows winners pay for losers — discipline working. Key behavioral note: must not enter EXIDEIND or any new CNC in last 75 minutes; let the book run. Tomorrow priority is event-management for ANANTRAJ (May 11) and any name with Q4 in next 3 sessions."
}
